predicate_mappings.case_allowed_clinical_service: {} is allowed for the clinical service {}
predicate_mappings.case_allowed_diagnostic_resource: {} is allowed for the diagnostic resource {}

predicate_mappings.case_allowed_lab_sample_slot: {} is allowed the lab sample slot {}

predicate_mappings.case_allowed_specialist_slot: {} is allowed a specialist appointment slot {}

register_maternal_visit_case.description: register a maternal visit case A as a completed case
preconditions: I can only register a maternal visit case A as a completed case if it is not the case that A is a registered case and it is not the case that A is completed
effects: Once I register a maternal visit case A as a completed case, it is the case that A is a registered case

reserve_appointment_slot_for_case.description: reserve an appointment slot B for a maternal visit case A
preconditions: I can only reserve an appointment slot B for a maternal visit case A if it is the case that A is a registered case and B is available and A is allowed in the appointment slot B
I can only reserve an appointment slot B for a maternal visit case A if it is not the case that A has a booking flag
effects: Once I reserve an appointment slot B for a maternal visit case A, it is the case that A has an appointment slot B and A has a booking flag
Once I reserve an appointment slot B for a maternal visit case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

cancel_appointment_slot_for_case.description: cancel an appointment slot B for a maternal visit case A
preconditions: I can only cancel an appointment slot B for a maternal visit case A if it is the case that A has an appointment slot B
I can only cancel an appointment slot B for a maternal visit case A if it is not the case that the service is allocated for A and it is not the case that A is ready for the procedure
effects: Once I cancel an appointment slot B for a maternal visit case A, it is the case that B is available

Once I cancel an appointment slot B for a maternal visit case A, it is not the case anymore that A has an appointment slot B and it is not the case anymore that A has a booking flag and it is not the case anymore that A is checked in and it is not the case anymore that A has completed the initial assessment and it is not the case anymore that A is assigned to ancillary and it is not the case anymore that the procedure for A is completed and it is not the case anymore that A requires a lab flag

reserve_time_slot_for_case.description: reserve a time slot B for a maternal visit case A
preconditions: I can only reserve a time slot B for a maternal visit case A if it is the case that A is a registered case and B is available
effects: Once I reserve a time slot B for a maternal visit case A, it is the case that B is reserved for A
Once I reserve a time slot B for a maternal visit case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

release_time_slot_for_case.description: release a time slot B from a maternal visit case A
preconditions: I can only release a time slot B from a maternal visit case A if it is the case that B is reserved for A
effects: Once I release a time slot B from a maternal visit case A, it is the case that B is available
Once I release a time slot B from a maternal visit case A, it is not the case anymore that B is reserved for A

confirm_case_checkin_for_time_slot.description: confirm check in of a maternal visit case A for a time slot B
preconditions: I can only confirm check in of a maternal visit case A for a time slot B if it is the case that A is a registered case and A has a booking flag and B is reserved for A
I can only confirm check in of a maternal visit case A for a time slot B if it is not the case that A is checked in
effects: Once I confirm check in of a maternal visit case A for a time slot B, it is the case that A is checked in

assign_ancillary_staff_to_case.description: assign an ancillary staff B to a maternal visit case A
preconditions: I can only assign an ancillary staff B to a maternal visit case A if it is the case that A is a registered case and A has a booking flag and B is available
I can only assign an ancillary staff B to a maternal visit case A if it is not the case that A is checked in
effects: Once I assign an ancillary staff B to a maternal visit case A, it is the case that A is checked in and A is assigned to ancillary
Once I assign an ancillary staff B to a maternal visit case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

perform_assessment_with_equipment.description: perform assessment for a maternal visit case A using a special equipment C during a time slot B
preconditions: I can only perform assessment for a maternal visit case A using a special equipment C during a time slot B if it is the case that A is checked in and A has a booking flag and B is reserved for A and C is available
I can only perform assessment for a maternal visit case A using a special equipment C during a time slot B if it is not the case that A has completed the initial assessment
effects: Once I perform assessment for a maternal visit case A using a special equipment C during a time slot B, it is the case that A has completed the initial assessment
Once I perform assessment for a maternal visit case A using a special equipment C during a time slot B, it is not the case anymore that A is assigned to ancillary

complete_assessment_with_specialist_slot.description: complete assessment for a maternal visit case A during a specialist appointment slot B
preconditions: I can only complete assessment for a maternal visit case A during a specialist appointment slot B if it is the case that A has a booking flag and A has a confirmed appointment in B
I can only complete assessment for a maternal visit case A during a specialist appointment slot B if it is not the case that A has completed the initial assessment
effects: Once I complete assessment for a maternal visit case A during a specialist appointment slot B, it is the case that A has completed the initial assessment
Once I complete assessment for a maternal visit case A during a specialist appointment slot B, it is not the case anymore that A is assigned to ancillary

reserve_diagnostic_resource_for_case.description: reserve a diagnostic resource B for a maternal visit case A
preconditions: I can only reserve a diagnostic resource B for a maternal visit case A if it is the case that A is a registered case and B is available and A is allowed for the diagnostic resource B
effects: Once I reserve a diagnostic resource B for a maternal visit case A, it is the case that A has reserved the diagnostic resource B
Once I reserve a diagnostic resource B for a maternal visit case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

release_diagnostic_resource_for_case.description: release a diagnostic resource B from a maternal visit case A
preconditions: I can only release a diagnostic resource B from a maternal visit case A if it is the case that A has reserved the diagnostic resource B
effects: Once I release a diagnostic resource B from a maternal visit case A, it is the case that B is available
Once I release a diagnostic resource B from a maternal visit case A, it is not the case anymore that A has reserved the diagnostic resource B

reserve_clinical_location_for_case.description: reserve a clinical location B for a maternal visit case A
preconditions: I can only reserve a clinical location B for a maternal visit case A if it is the case that A is a registered case and B is available and A is allowed at the clinical location B
effects: Once I reserve a clinical location B for a maternal visit case A, it is the case that A has reserved the location B
Once I reserve a clinical location B for a maternal visit case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

release_clinical_location_for_case.description: release a clinical location B from a maternal visit case A
preconditions: I can only release a clinical location B from a maternal visit case A if it is the case that A has reserved the location B
effects: Once I release a clinical location B from a maternal visit case A, it is the case that B is available
Once I release a clinical location B from a maternal visit case A, it is not the case anymore that A has reserved the location B

reserve_support_service_for_case.description: reserve a support service B for a maternal visit case A
preconditions: I can only reserve a support service B for a maternal visit case A if it is the case that A is a registered case and B is available and A is allowed the support service B
effects: Once I reserve a support service B for a maternal visit case A, it is the case that A has reserved the support service B
Once I reserve a support service B for a maternal visit case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

release_support_service_for_case.description: release a support service B from a maternal visit case A
preconditions: I can only release a support service B from a maternal visit case A if it is the case that A has reserved the support service B
effects: Once I release a support service B from a maternal visit case A, it is the case that B is available
Once I release a support service B from a maternal visit case A, it is not the case anymore that A has reserved the support service B

reserve_external_service_for_case.description: reserve an external service B for a maternal visit case A
preconditions: I can only reserve an external service B for a maternal visit case A if it is the case that A is a registered case and B is available and A is allowed the external service B
effects: Once I reserve an external service B for a maternal visit case A, it is the case that A has reserved the external service B
Once I reserve an external service B for a maternal visit case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

release_external_service_for_case.description: release an external service B for a maternal visit case A
preconditions: I can only release an external service B for a maternal visit case A if it is the case that A has reserved the external service B
effects: Once I release an external service B for a maternal visit case A, it is the case that B is available
Once I release an external service B for a maternal visit case A, it is not the case anymore that A has reserved the external service B

schedule_clinical_service_providers_and_.description: schedule a clinical service B and a diagnostic resource C at a clinical location D for a maternal visit case A
preconditions: I can only schedule a clinical service B and a diagnostic resource C at a clinical location D for a maternal visit case A if it is the case that A has a booking flag and A has reserved the diagnostic resource C and A has reserved the location D and B is available and A is allowed for the clinical service B
I can only schedule a clinical service B and a diagnostic resource C at a clinical location D for a maternal visit case A if it is not the case that the service is allocated for A
effects: Once I schedule a clinical service B and a diagnostic resource C at a clinical location D for a maternal visit case A, it is the case that A has scheduled the clinical service B and the service is allocated for A
Once I schedule a clinical service B and a diagnostic resource C at a clinical location D for a maternal visit case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

schedule_service_with_support_and_lab.description: schedule a clinical service B with a support service C and a lab sample slot D for a maternal visit case A
preconditions: I can only schedule a clinical service B with a support service C and a lab sample slot D for a maternal visit case A if it is the case that A has a booking flag and A has reserved the support service C and D is available and B is available and A is allowed for the clinical service B and A is allowed the lab sample slot D
I can only schedule a clinical service B with a support service C and a lab sample slot D for a maternal visit case A if it is not the case that the service is allocated for A
effects: Once I schedule a clinical service B with a support service C and a lab sample slot D for a maternal visit case A, it is the case that A has scheduled the clinical service B and the service is allocated for A and A requires a lab flag and A is assigned to ancillary

Once I schedule a clinical service B with a support service C and a lab sample slot D for a maternal visit case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available and it is not the case anymore that D is available

resolve_lab_requirement.description: resolve lab requirement for a maternal visit case A using a diagnostic resource B at a clinical location C
preconditions: I can only resolve lab requirement for a maternal visit case A using a diagnostic resource B at a clinical location C if it is the case that the service is allocated for A and A requires a lab flag and A has reserved the diagnostic resource B and A has reserved the location C
effects: Once I resolve lab requirement for a maternal visit case A using a diagnostic resource B at a clinical location C, it is not the case anymore that A requires a lab flag and it is not the case anymore that A is assigned to ancillary

authorize_procedure_with_midwife.description: authorize procedure for a maternal visit case A with a midwife D using a diagnostic resource B at a clinical location C
preconditions: I can only authorize procedure for a maternal visit case A with a midwife D using a diagnostic resource B at a clinical location C if it is the case that A has completed the initial assessment and the service is allocated for A and A has reserved the diagnostic resource B and A has reserved the location C and A is assigned to the clinical staff D

I can only authorize procedure for a maternal visit case A with a midwife D using a diagnostic resource B at a clinical location C if it is not the case that A is assigned to ancillary and it is not the case that A is ready for the procedure
effects: Once I authorize procedure for a maternal visit case A with a midwife D using a diagnostic resource B at a clinical location C, it is the case that A is ready for the procedure

authorize_procedure_with_obstetrician.description: authorize procedure for a maternal visit case A with an obstetrician D using a support service B and an external service C
preconditions: I can only authorize procedure for a maternal visit case A with an obstetrician D using a support service B and an external service C if it is the case that A has completed the initial assessment and the service is allocated for A and A has reserved the support service B and A has reserved the external service C and A is assigned to the clinical staff D
I can only authorize procedure for a maternal visit case A with an obstetrician D using a support service B and an external service C if it is not the case that A is ready for the procedure
effects: Once I authorize procedure for a maternal visit case A with an obstetrician D using a support service B and an external service C, it is the case that A is ready for the procedure and A is assigned to ancillary

complete_procedure_and_finalize_stage.description: complete procedure and finalize stage for a maternal visit case A using a diagnostic resource B at a clinical location C
preconditions: I can only complete procedure and finalize stage for a maternal visit case A using a diagnostic resource B at a clinical location C if it is the case that A is ready for the procedure and A is assigned to ancillary and A has reserved the diagnostic resource B and A has reserved the location C
effects: Once I complete procedure and finalize stage for a maternal visit case A using a diagnostic resource B at a clinical location C, it is the case that the procedure for A is completed

Once I complete procedure and finalize stage for a maternal visit case A using a diagnostic resource B at a clinical location C, it is not the case anymore that A is assigned to ancillary and it is not the case anymore that A has completed the initial assessment and it is not the case anymore that A requires a lab flag

reassess_with_time_slot_and_equipment.description: reassess a maternal visit case A with a time slot B and a special equipment C
preconditions: I can only reassess a maternal visit case A with a time slot B and a special equipment C if it is the case that the procedure for A is completed and A is ready for the procedure and A has a booking flag and B is reserved for A and C is available
I can only reassess a maternal visit case A with a time slot B and a special equipment C if it is not the case that A has completed the initial assessment
effects: Once I reassess a maternal visit case A with a time slot B and a special equipment C, it is the case that A has completed the initial assessment

mark_specialist_referral_ready_via_time_.description: mark a maternal visit case A as specialist referral ready via a time slot B
preconditions: I can only mark a maternal visit case A as specialist referral ready via a time slot B if it is the case that A is ready for the procedure and A has completed the initial assessment and B is reserved for A
I can only mark a maternal visit case A as specialist referral ready via a time slot B if it is not the case that A is assigned to ancillary and it is not the case that A is eligible for a specialist
effects: Once I mark a maternal visit case A as specialist referral ready via a time slot B, it is the case that A is eligible for a specialist

mark_specialist_referral_ready_with_anci.description: mark a maternal visit case A as specialist referral ready with an ancillary staff B
preconditions: I can only mark a maternal visit case A as specialist referral ready with an ancillary staff B if it is the case that A is ready for the procedure and A has completed the initial assessment and B is available

I can only mark a maternal visit case A as specialist referral ready with an ancillary staff B if it is not the case that A is assigned to ancillary and it is not the case that A is eligible for a specialist
effects: Once I mark a maternal visit case A as specialist referral ready with an ancillary staff B, it is the case that A is eligible for a specialist
Once I mark a maternal visit case A as specialist referral ready with an ancillary staff B, it is not the case anymore that B is available

reserve_specialist_appointment_for_case.description: reserve a specialist appointment slot B for a maternal visit case A
preconditions: I can only reserve a specialist appointment slot B for a maternal visit case A if it is the case that A is eligible for a specialist and B is available and A is allowed a specialist appointment slot B
effects: Once I reserve a specialist appointment slot B for a maternal visit case A, it is the case that A has reserved the specialist appointment slot B
Once I reserve a specialist appointment slot B for a maternal visit case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

confirm_specialist_slot_for_case_transit.description: confirm a specialist appointment slot C for transition from a prenatal case instance B to a postnatal case instance A
preconditions: I can only confirm a specialist appointment slot C for transition from a prenatal case instance B to a postnatal case instance A if it is the case that A is a registered case and A is a postnatal case and A is assigned to C and B has reserved the specialist appointment slot C
I can only confirm a specialist appointment slot C for transition from a prenatal case instance B to a postnatal case instance A if it is not the case that A has a confirmed appointment in C
effects: Once I confirm a specialist appointment slot C for transition from a prenatal case instance B to a postnatal case instance A, it is the case that A has a confirmed appointment in C

confirm_time_slot_checkin_for_case.description: confirm check in for a maternal visit case A at a time slot B with a special equipment C
preconditions: I can only confirm check in for a maternal visit case A at a time slot B with a special equipment C if it is the case that A is a registered case and A is a postnatal case and A has completed the initial assessment and A is eligible for a specialist and B is reserved for A and C is available
I can only confirm check in for a maternal visit case A at a time slot B with a special equipment C if it is not the case that A has a confirmed check in
effects: Once I confirm check in for a maternal visit case A at a time slot B with a special equipment C, it is the case that A has a confirmed check in

finalize_case_completion.description: finalize completion for a maternal visit case A
preconditions: I can only finalize completion for a maternal visit case A if it is the case that A is a prenatal case and A is a registered case and A has a booking flag and the service is allocated for A and A is ready for the procedure and A is eligible for a specialist and A has completed the initial assessment
I can only finalize completion for a maternal visit case A if it is not the case that A is completed
effects: Once I finalize completion for a maternal visit case A, it is the case that A is completed

finalize_case_completion_with_specialist.description: finalize completion for a maternal visit case A with a specialist appointment slot B
preconditions: I can only finalize completion for a maternal visit case A with a specialist appointment slot B if it is the case that A is a postnatal case and A is a registered case and A has a booking flag and the service is allocated for A and A is ready for the procedure and A is eligible for a specialist and A has completed the initial assessment and A has a confirmed appointment in B
I can only finalize completion for a maternal visit case A with a specialist appointment slot B if it is not the case that A is completed
effects: Once I finalize completion for a maternal visit case A with a specialist appointment slot B, it is the case that A is completed

finalize_case_completion_with_checkin.description: finalize completion for a maternal visit case A with check in
preconditions: I can only finalize completion for a maternal visit case A with check in if it is the case that A is a postnatal case and A is a registered case and A has a booking flag and the service is allocated for A and A is ready for the procedure and A is eligible for a specialist and A has completed the initial assessment and A has a confirmed check in
I can only finalize completion for a maternal visit case A with check in if it is not the case that A is completed
effects: Once I finalize completion for a maternal visit case A with check in, it is the case that A is completed

action_nl_templates.register_maternal_visit_case: register maternal visit case {?maternal_visit_case} as a completed case
action_nl_templates.reserve_appointment_slot_for_case: reserve appointment slot {?appointment_slot} for maternal visit case {?maternal_visit_case}
action_nl_templates.cancel_appointment_slot_for_case: cancel appointment slot {?appointment_slot} for maternal visit case {?maternal_visit_case}
action_nl_templates.reserve_time_slot_for_case: reserve time slot {?time_slot} for maternal visit case {?maternal_visit_case}
action_nl_templates.release_time_slot_for_case: release time slot {?time_slot} from maternal visit case {?maternal_visit_case}
action_nl_templates.confirm_case_checkin_for_time_slot: confirm check-in of maternal visit case {?maternal_visit_case} for time slot {?time_slot}
action_nl_templates.assign_ancillary_staff_to_case: assign ancillary staff {?ancillary_staff} to maternal visit case {?maternal_visit_case}
action_nl_templates.perform_assessment_with_equipment: perform assessment for maternal visit case {?maternal_visit_case} using special equipment {?special_equipment} during time slot {?time_slot}
action_nl_templates.complete_assessment_with_specialist_slot: complete assessment for maternal visit case {?maternal_visit_case} during specialist appointment slot {?specialist_appointment_slot}
action_nl_templates.reserve_diagnostic_resource_for_case: reserve diagnostic resource {?diagnostic_resource} for maternal visit case {?maternal_visit_case}
action_nl_templates.release_diagnostic_resource_for_case: release diagnostic resource {?diagnostic_resource} from maternal visit case {?maternal_visit_case}
action_nl_templates.reserve_clinical_location_for_case: reserve clinical location {?clinical_location} for maternal visit case {?maternal_visit_case}
action_nl_templates.release_clinical_location_for_case: release clinical location {?clinical_location} from maternal visit case {?maternal_visit_case}
action_nl_templates.reserve_support_service_for_case: reserve support service {?support_service} for maternal visit case {?maternal_visit_case}
action_nl_templates.release_support_service_for_case: release support service {?support_service} from maternal visit case {?maternal_visit_case}
action_nl_templates.reserve_external_service_for_case: reserve external service {?external_service} for maternal visit case {?maternal_visit_case}

type_hierarchy: Everything that is a entity is also a object

Everything that is a maternal visit case or a appointment slot or a clinical service or a clinical location or a diagnostic resource or a support service or a time slot or a ancillary staff or a specialist appointment slot or a special equipment or a lab sample slot or a external service or a clinical staff is also a entity
Everything that is a midwife or a obstetrician is also a clinical staff
Everything that is a prenatal case instance or a postnatal case instance is also a maternal visit case
